title: clibadium sylvestre
intro: Clibadium sylvestre, also known as the forest soursop, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The leaves and roots of the Clibadium sylvestre plant are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Clibadium sylvestre plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
